title: Examples Must Be Runnable
guidance: Code snippets and setup instructions should work as written with prerequisites made explicit
do: Link prerequisites and validate copy-paste examples
dont: Do not publish examples that assume hidden context

title: Ship Docs with Features
guidance: New features and breaking changes need corresponding documentation updates
do: Update README runbooks and migration notes when behavior changes
dont: Do not merge user-facing changes with stale docs

title: Lead with Outcomes
guidance: Documentation should explain value and failure modes before diving into implementation detail
do: State what the reader can accomplish and where it can fail
dont: Do not bury the main outcome under unnecessary exposition
